visual_description: A medium shot shows a man in a dark suit and tie standing in what appears to be an office or briefing room. He gestures with his hands as he speaks to two other men. One man, in a light blue shirt, stands to the left, listening. In the foreground, another man in a dark blue jacket is crouched down, looking up at the speaker. The background consists of a large, framed map or blueprint on the wall, which is partially covered in what looks like white tape or markings. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera zooms in for a close-up on the man in the suit. He has a serious expression and continues to speak, looking slightly off-camera. The background is a blurry, textured surface, likely the map behind him. The "风行网" watermark remains in the corner. A man speaks in a serious and authoritative tone, delivering information with a steady, deliberate pace. His voice is clear and firm, suggesting he is giving important directions or briefing others on a critical matter.
